## Overview

`~/.claude` is both a Claude Code config dir (where root `CLAUDE.md` = global) and a normal git repo.
- Global rules → `CLAUDE.md` (root)
- Repo-only rules → `.claude/CLAUDE.md` (this file)
- Decision: "needed in other projects?" → yes: global, no: project

## Project Skills (auto-generated by `/sync-skills`)

Invoke matching skills before acting. Heed override instructions in each entry.

- `/review-claude-config` — Review ~/.claude configuration against the latest Claude Code features and best practices, then suggest updates.

## Directory Structure

- `agents/` — custom agent definitions
- `skills/` — skill definitions (auto-triggered)
- `rules/` — global rules auto-loaded for all projects
- `bin/status.py` — status-line display
- `design-docs/{slug}/design-doc.md` — design docs (gitignored)
- `projects/` — Claude Code session transcripts
- `vendor/` — third-party git submodules (e.g., `vendor/slidev`)
- `settings.json` — global Claude Code settings
